item.name: Shisui Goby
item.description:
With its fondness for migratory journeys, this saltwater fish puts the “go” in “goby.”

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Although mainly found in the coral reefs surrounding Shisui of the Violet Tides, this variety of goby is also known to migrate widely upon the currents of the Ruby Sea. The people of Sui-no-Sato look upon them affectionately as little servants of the palace.
